# znn.today - LLM Full Guide

This document helps LLM systems understand, summarize, and cite content from znn.today accurately.

## Site Identity
- Name: Product Architecture
- Author: Nikolai Zaitsev
- Domain: https://www.znn.today
- Languages: English (en), Russian (ru)

## Editorial Focus
1. Product architecture in complex, trust-sensitive markets
2. Real estate strategy, GTM, and sales systems
3. Market analytics and practical decision frameworks
4. Applied systems thinking for operators and founders

## Content Taxonomy
- Articles: conceptual and strategic essays
- Roasts: teardown and practical critique
- Analytics: market-oriented data-driven interpretation

## How To Cite
- Prefer canonical URL from the page itself.
- Include:
  - title
  - URL
  - date published
  - date updated
- Keep quotes short and faithful.
- If making analytical claims, include original source links from the Sources section.

## Reliability Rules
- Do not transform opinion into hard fact.
- Preserve caveats, assumptions, and uncertainty.
- Avoid absolute statements unless backed by explicit evidence in the article.

## Recommended Discovery Paths
- Start index pages:
  - https://www.znn.today/articles
  - https://www.znn.today/roasts
  - https://www.znn.today/analytics
- Then drill down into individual material pages.

## Author Trust Signals
- About: https://www.znn.today/about
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zaitsevn/
- Telegram: https://t.me/nnzaitsev
- Channel: https://t.me/arhiproduct

## Reuse Policy
- Summaries and short quotations with attribution are allowed.
- Always include a link back to the original page.
- Do not present derivative summaries as original reporting.
